quiz.question:
Black moves the queen to e2.

Is the game over?

answers.text: The game is over. It's checkmate.

feedback.text: Correct! The White king is under attack by the queen, and it can't move anywhere.

distractors.text: The game is over. It's stalemate.

feedback.text: It would be stalemate if the king wasn't under attack, but it is in this case. The queen is attacking the king.

distractors.text: The game is not over. White can play on.

feedback.text: The White king doesn't have legal moves in this position.
